evaluationPhase: snapshot-routing
configurationKind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration

  - index: 0
    name: "selector.example.com"
    sourcePath: ".configuration.validatingWebhookConfiguration.webhooks[0]"
    configurationKind: ValidatingWebhookConfiguration
    determination: unsupported
    outcome: null
    terminalReasons:
      - CAPABILITY_OUTSIDE_PROFILE
    trace:
      - sequence: 0
        stage: "matchConditions"
        sourcePath: ".configuration.validatingWebhookConfiguration.webhooks[0].matchConditions[0]"
        result: unsupported
        reasonCode: CAPABILITY_OUTSIDE_PROFILE
        terminal: true
        pending: false
        discarded: false
        inputSummary:
          "expression": "redacted"
    diagnostics:

        severity: info
